lines.text: Hey! Can I see your ID.

lines.speaker: Thorten
lines.text: the names Thorten! I am the keeper of this here dungeon.

lines.speaker: You
lines.text: Um could you please tell me more about the dungeon.

lines.speaker: You
lines.text: you see, I am new and never been in a dungeon before.

lines.speaker: You
lines.text: Um yes, I just arrived to Ignisgate this morning.

lines.speaker: Thorten
lines.text: AH a newbie are ya? Well yer came to the right place, as the keeper I know all there is to know about this dungeon!

lines.speaker: Thorten
lines.text: Basically, ya go in there, kill all the monsters, take thier loot, sell thier loot, and then ya repeat.

lines.speaker: Thorten
lines.text: There be rest sites every 3 floors, use it to regain mana and health. You can progress a floor by killing the floor boss, she'll come out after 5 combats.

lines.speaker: Thorten
lines.text: And thats about it. Good luck out there kiddo.
